title: Robin Leads Cobra Below
description: On pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this part focuses on crocodile’s plan begins to collapse. The fight around the royal tomb and the capital reaches its breaking point as Crocodile loses control of both the battlefield and his secrets.
scene: This scene belongs to the Crocodile’s Plan Begins to Collapse sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Crocodile, King Cobra, Luffy, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You were a most capable partner,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: But I'll be killing you here.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Back then, you told me this...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You were a highly useful woman.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Do you know why, Nice Robin...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: I will forgive everything, nice Robin.

summary: The fight around the royal tomb and the capital reaches its breaking point as Crocodile loses control of both the battlefield and his secrets.
